product.name: Mophie 2-in-1 Wireless Charging Stand - Qi2-Certified, MagSafe Charger for iPhone & AirPods – Fast Charging Station with Adjustable Phone Stand & Cable Management – Up to 15W Power
product.description: Power Simplified. Space You Love.Charging two devices has never been easier. The Mophie 2-in-1 Wireless Charging Stand delivers fast, reliable power to your iPhone and AirPods/AirPods Pro simultaneously. This Qi2-certified fast wireless charging station provides up to 15W of power for quick, efficient charging that starts on contact—no extra cables required. As a premium wireless charger, it’s designed to deliver dependable performance for all your MagSafe-compatible devices. Simply place your devices on the magnetic charging surfaces, and power begins to flow instantly.Designed to fit seamlessly into your lifestyle, this compact charging stand takes up minimal space while adding maximum convenience. Perfect for your nightstand, desk, or counter, it helps keep your area clean and organized. The adjustable head allows you to set your iPhone at the ideal viewing angle for video calls, streaming, or catching up on notifications. With MagSafe-compatible precision alignment, you’ll always get a secure, uninterrupted charge.The Mophie 2-in-1 Wireless Charging Stand is Qi2-certified and built with integrated cable management that coils neatly into the base—no more cluttered cords. Whether you’re setting up your workspace or streamlining your bedside, this 2 in 1 charging station for Apple devices makes powering up effortless. Add to Cart now and simplify your power routine with Mophie. Key Features:Qi2-certified and MagSafe-compatibleDelivers up to 15W of fast wireless charging powerCharges iPhone and AirPods/AirPods Pro simultaneouslyCompact, space-saving design fits nightstands and desksAdjustable phone stand for ideal viewing anglesIntegrated cable management for a clutter-free setupIncludes Mophie 2-year warranty
features: FAST WIRELESS CHARGING: Enjoy up to 15W of fast-charging wireless power for your iPhone and other Qi2-compatible devices. This powerful MagSafe charger delivers efficient, high-speed charging on contact

CHARGE 2 DEVICES SIMULTANEOUSLY: Power your iPhone and AirPods/AirPods Pro at once with this 2-in-1 charging station for Apple devices—ideal for keeping your essentials powered overnight or at your desk
AIRPODS CHARGING SPOT: The designated charging area for your AirPods or AirPods Pro delivers up to 5W of power for reliable, efficient charging without messy cables
ADJUSTABLE PHONE STAND: Tilt your iPhone to the perfect angle for FaceTime, video calls, or watching your favorite shows while it charges—perfect for nightstands or compact workspaces
CABLE MANAGEMENT & WARRANTY: Keep your space neat with an integrated cable that coils neatly into the base. Compact and elegant, this phone charger includes a 2-year Mophie warranty for peace of mind
